title: DID Cable Ties Assorted Colours, 120 Pack, 2mm x 150mm

Self-locking wire ties are designed with rounded edges to provide easy handling and prevent snagging in tight spaces

ratcheting mechanism provides a secure connection
description: Ylon cables ties are perfect for a range of uses from securing small items to home, office, garage and workshop cables. Self-locking wire ties are designed with rounded edges to provide easy handling and prevent snagging in tight spaces durable single-use ties are rated with a 17 lb or 48 lb tensile strength; increase the tensile strength by using two or more together in a row indoor use wire ties are constructed with fire resistant materials; ratcheting mechanism provides a secure connection nylong tie wraps easily around a cable jacket, locking teeth stop the cable tie at the desired length.
